name: glanceway
description: Connect Claude to your Glanceway menu bar app — browse sources and read items.

tools.name: glanceway_list_sources
tools.description: List all enabled sources configured in Glanceway

tools.name: glanceway_list_items
tools.description: List items from Glanceway sources, sorted by timestamp

prompts.name: summarize
prompts.description: Summarize all current Glanceway items grouped by source
prompts.text: Use the glanceway_list_sources tool to get all sources, then use glanceway_list_items to fetch items. Group items by source and summarize the most notable recent items.
